revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (en:Aso Shrine, simple:Aso Shrine); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:42, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1285263259 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:42, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start| {{WikiProject Japan|importance=high|shinto=yes}} {{WikiProject Architecture}} {{WikiProject Religion|importance=}} }} == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified {{plural:4|one external link|4 external links}} on [[Aso Shrine]]. Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=745219508 my edit]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20081204191951/http://edpas.net/journal/109/ to http://edpas.net/journal/109/ *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20110607060650/http://www.iexplore.com/dmap/Japan/Event/16312 to http://www.iexplore.com/dmap/Japan/Event/16312 *Added {{tlx|dead link}} tag to http://www.jstage.jst.go.jp/article/jaabe/7/2/7_209/_article *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20090207094149/http://kyushu-tourist.com:80/asoshrine.html to http://www.kyushu-tourist.com/asoshrine.html *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20090326023624/http://www.kumamoto-u.ac.jp:80/e/aboutKU/library/index.html to http://www.kumamoto-u.ac.jp/e/aboutKU/library/index.html When you have finished reviewing my changes, please set the ''checked'' parameter below to '''true''' or '''failed''' to let others know (documentation at {{tlx|Sourcecheck}}). {{sourcecheck|checked=false}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 22:59, 19 October 2016 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:42, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified 3 external links on [[Aso Shrine]]. Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=789954592 my edit]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20130517061440/http://eos.kokugakuin.ac.jp/modules/xwords/images/uploads/EOS070712Ab.pdf to http://eos.kokugakuin.ac.jp/modules/xwords/images/uploads/EOS070712Ab.pdf *Corrected formatting/usage for http://kyushu-tourist.com/asoshrine.html *Corrected formatting/usage for http://www.kumamoto-u.ac.jp/e/aboutKU/library/index.html When you have finished reviewing my changes, you may follow the instructions on the template below to fix any issues with the URLs. {{sourcecheck|checked=false|needhelp=}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 17:48, 10 July 2017 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:42, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Simple English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://simple.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/8372508 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:42, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{translated page|en|Aso-jinja|version=520436362}}

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Aso_Shrine here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
